title: Dead call to TeamStatsByFilter in toolGetTeamStats
evidence: tools.go:216-217 calls db.TeamStatsByFilter(team+"_home_only", ...) then discards it with `_ = homeStats`; the home/away split is recomputed inline below
suggestion: Delete the dead call (and the bogus '_home_only' team name) — it allocates and scans nothing useful

title: Extended match stats parsed but never surfaced
evidence: loader.go:375-382 populates HomeCorner/AwayCorner/Shots/Attacks/TotalCorners from BR-Football-Dataset.csv, but no tool in tools.go exposes them
suggestion: Add a tool or fields to search_matches output to expose corners/shots, or drop the unused parsing

title: MCP layer is hand-rolled rather than using an SDK
evidence: mcp_server.go:11-182 implements JSON-RPC 2.0 framing and the initialize/tools handshake by hand (stdlib only, no external deps)
suggestion: Acceptable for a self-contained demo; note that protocol edge cases (batch requests, content types) are not handled

title: Sample-question coverage asserted in tests, not documented
evidence: server_test.go TestSampleQuestions exercises representative queries; README.md is minimal (955 bytes) and does not enumerate the 20+ sample questions from TASK.md
suggestion: Optional: list supported sample questions in README for discoverability
